features.name: unpacked array with split_var attribute
features.description: Code should include a large unpacked array declared with /* verilator split_var */ attribute to trigger the UNOPTFLAT false positive

features.name: dynamic_sized unpacked array in tree structure
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked array with dynamic sizing based on parameter expressions (2**(IdxW+1)-2:0) used in a tree arbiter pattern

features.name: parallel tree arrays with split_var
features.description: Code should include multiple parallel unpacked arrays (sel_tree, idx_tree, data_tree) all using /* verilator split_var */ in a tree arbiter context
